# PariharaOnline - Ancient Rituals, Modern Convenience

> PariharaOnline is an online platform for booking authentic Hindu temple services, pujas, homams, and Vedic astrology consultations. Sacred prasad delivered worldwide since 2009.

## About
PariharaOnline (operated by Harkarma Enterprises LLP) connects devotees worldwide with authentic Vedic rituals performed at renowned temples across India. "Parihara" means "Remedy" in Sanskrit — the platform specializes in spiritual remedies through pujas, homams, and astrology services.

- Founded: 2009
- Headquarters: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India
- Contact: hello@pariharaonline.com | WhatsApp: +91 974-324-4501
- Website: https://pariharaonline.com

## Services

### Pujas & Homams (Fire Rituals)
Sacred fire rituals and temple pujas performed by experienced Vedic priests:
- Navagraha Homam - Planetary harmony ritual (₹8,450 / $102)
- Swayamvara Parvathi Homam - Marriage blessings (₹8,350 / $101)
- Mrityunjaya Homam - Health and longevity (₹7,600 / $92)
- Saraswati Homam - Education and knowledge (₹7,250 / $88)
- Maha Ganapathi Homam - Obstacle removal (₹6,800 / $82)
- Sudarshana Homam - Business prosperity (₹6,500 / $79)
- Ayushya Homam - Birthday blessing (₹5,100 / $62)
- Dhanwantari Homam - Healing ritual (₹5,100 / $62)
- Hayagreeva Homam - Exam success (₹5,000 / $61)
- Durga Saptashati Chanting - Protection (₹4,450 / $54)

### Astrology Services
Expert Vedic astrology consultations:
- Ask Our Astrologer - General consultation (₹2,501 / $31)
- Health Astrology Report (₹2,501 / $31)
- Career Path Analysis - 2-3 year forecast (₹4,501 / $55)

### Temple Services
Pujas at specific renowned temples:
- Kamakshi Amman Temple, Kanchipuram (₹2,450 / $30)
- Palani Murugan Temple (₹915 / $11)
- Brahma Vidya Ganapati Temple Abhishekam (₹1,750 / $22)
- Rahu Ketu Dosha at Sri Kalahasti (₹1,450 / $18)
- Thila Homam at Rameswaram (₹23,500 / $284)

### Sacred Prasad & Items
Authentic temple offerings shipped worldwide:
- Shirdi Sai Baba Udi (₹950 / $12)
- Palani Panchamritham (₹750 / $10)
- Garbarakshambigai Temple Ghee (₹2,470 / $30)
- Garbarakshambigai Temple Oil (₹2,470 / $30)

- Coconut Breaking Ritual (₹1,800 / $22)
- Annadhanam - Food Donation (₹2,100 / $26)
- Ganesha-Hanuman Kavach (₹1,800 / $22)
- Pregnancy & Safe Childbirth Pujas (₹2,470 / $30)

### Festival Specials

- Saturn Transit Poojas (₹1,750 / $22)
- Navratri Special Package (₹1,800 / $22)
- Diwali Lakshmi Homam (₹2,750 / $34)
- Jupiter Transit 2025 (₹1,750 / $22)

## How It Works
1. Browse & Select - Choose a puja, homam, or astrology service
2. Provide Details - Enter sankalpam details (name, nakshatram/birth star, rasi/zodiac sign, gothram)
3. Secure Payment - Razorpay (India/INR) or PayPal (International/USD)
4. Receive Blessings - Puja performed within 7 days, sacred prasad shipped with tracking

## FAQ Topics
- Hindu Pujas & Rituals
- Vedic Astrology Basics
- Nakshatram (Birth Stars) & Rasi (Zodiac Signs)

- Online Temple Services

- Payment & Ordering
- Parihara (Spiritual Remedies)
- Marriage Compatibility
- Health & Wellness Rituals

## Key Information
- All 27 Nakshatrams (birth stars) and 12 Rasis (zodiac signs) supported
- Multi-devotee support: Up to 4 devotees per puja booking
- Dual currency: INR (India) and USD (International)
- Dual payment: Razorpay (India) and PayPal (International)
- Prasad delivery to 50+ countries
- 15+ years of trusted service
- 10,000+ pujas performed
